scripts.test:ci: npm run test --workspace=apps/contently && npm run test --workspace=packages/toolkit
scripts.lint:check: npm run lint:oxlint && npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:format
scripts.lint:fix: prettier --write . && oxlint --fix apps/contently/src server/src packages/toolkit/src && eslint --fix apps/contently/src server/src packages/toolkit/src
scripts.type-check: tsc --noEmit -p apps/contently/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/toolkit/tsconfig.json
